𝗔𝗪𝗘𝗦𝗢𝗠𝗘-𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗-𝗥𝗢𝗢𝗧 | To serve as a centralized, curated resource for discovering and learning about Android rooting tools, modules, and guides.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To serve as a centralized, curated resource for discovering and learning about Android rooting tools, modules, and guides.
📅 Created: Jul 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Extensive collection of 500+ root apps and modules
✅ Support for Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed (Xposed)
✅ Step-by-step rooting guides for diverse devices
✅ Categorized listing of apps and modules (Privacy, Performance, Gaming, etc.)
✅ Glossary of rooting terms
✅ Starter Kit for essential apps
✅ Web app for enhanced navigation and search


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 221 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Awesome Android Root is a comprehensive hub for Android rooting enthusiasts, offering a curated collection of over 500 top root apps, Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed modules, alongside detailed rooting guides for various devices. It aims to be a central resource for all things related to rooting and customizing Android devices.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗠𝗘𝗥 | To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and cost-effective solution for individuals and organizations to manage and distribute live video streams across multiple platforms and websites.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 HTML 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and cost-effective solution for individuals and organizations to manage and distribute live video streams across multiple platforms and websites.
📅 Created: Dec 2015 • Updated: Jul 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Self-hosted streaming server
✅ Ingest via RTMP and SRT
✅ Re-stream to YouTube, Twitch, Vimeo, etc.
✅ Embeddable VideoJS player
✅ Simplified User-Interface
✅ Wizard configuration
✅ Multiple audio/video inputs, outputs, protocols, and codecs
✅ Hardware acceleration support (Raspberry Pi, Nvidia Cuda, Intel VAAPI)
✅ REST-API (JSON) and Swagger documentation
✅ Viewer/Bandwidth Monitoring
✅ Automatic Let's Encrypt HTTPS


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 547 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 264 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Restreamer is a self-hosted, open-source streaming server solution that allows users to ingest live video streams (e.g., from OBS) via RTMP and SRT protocols. It then enables re-streaming to various platforms like YouTube, Twitch, and Vimeo, or embedding a player directly into a website. The solution offers a user-friendly interface, supports multiple codecs and protocols, and includes features for hardware acceleration and monitoring.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

Triangle Downloader is a Chrome extension for downloading YouTube video, audio, and subtitles directly within the browser. It captures the player stream locally without relying on external tools or servers, offering options for video quality, audio format, and subtitle extraction.

𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗗𝗘𝗟 | To provide users with a private, offline, and intuitive mobile application for tracking their menstrual cycle, managing medications, and receiving timely reminders.  🌟 Rising Fast!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📊 Dart 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a private, offline, and intuitive mobile application for tracking their menstrual cycle, managing medications, and receiving timely reminders.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Jul 2026

✅ Log with a Tap for periods
✅ Track flow, pain, and symptoms
✅ View menstrual history journal
✅ Predictive forecasts for next period
✅ Countdown to next cycle
✅ Flexible pill pack setup
✅ Daily pill intake logging
✅ LARC tracking and renewal reminders
✅ Timely and customizable reminders for periods and LARC expiry

Menstrudel is a free, open-source, and privacy-focused period and pill tracking mobile application built with Flutter. It offers offline functionality for logging menstrual cycles, tracking symptoms, predicting future periods, and managing medication schedules.

Transcriber is a self-hosted, open-source web application that leverages OpenAI Whisper and FastAPI for AI-powered audio and video transcription. It prioritizes user privacy by processing data locally and offers features like YouTube URL transcription, local file uploads, real-time progress updates via WebSockets, and a smart media library.

ExploitDB-Hunter is a lightweight Python command-line tool designed to simplify the process of searching and downloading exploits from the Exploit-DB database. It offers an interactive terminal interface, eliminating the need to manually browse the website.
